programme.desc: Oscar-winner Christopher Walken stars in this supernatural thriller where the forces of Heaven and Hell fight an epic battle over mankind. Only a priest turned detective and a little girl can stop the dark angel Gabriel (Walken) and save the world.

programme.title: Jacob's Ladder, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: A Vietnam War veteran, now a New York City postal worker, struggles with flashbacks and hallucinations. With the help of his new bride, he fights to keep sane while his brain fluctuates between reality and delusion.

programme.title: Hellraiser, (1987, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: A woman discovers the newly resurrected, partially formed, body of her brother-in-law and lover. She starts killing for him to revitalize his body and escape the demonic beings that are pursuing him after he escaped their underworld.

programme.title: Hellraiser II: Hellbound, (1988, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: Kirsty is brought to an institution after the horrible events of Hellraiser (1987), where the occult-obsessive head doctor resurrects Julia and unleashes the Cenobites and their demonic underworld.

programme.title: Children of the Corn, (1984, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: A young couple is trapped in a remote town where a dangerous religious cult of children believes that everyone over age 18 must be killed.

programme.title: Evil Dead II, (1987, Horror)
programme.desc: Ash, the sole survivor of THE EVIL DEAD, returns to the same cabin in the woods and again unleashes the dead. With his girlfriend possessed and his body parts running amok, Ash must again single-handedly battle the damned in this unhinged horror classic!

programme.title: The Relic, (1997, Horror)
programme.desc: Come in—if you dare. The opening-night gala for a new exhibit at Chicago's natural history museum is underway. But be advised: something terrifying wants to make sure no one ever leaves.

programme.title: Donnie Darko (Theatrical Cut), (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a man in a large rabbit suit who manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

programme.title: Vacancy, (2007, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: A suspenseful, classic thriller, in the tradition of Alfred Hitchcock, starring Luke Wilson and Kate Beckinsale, that will keep you on the edge of your seat and your heart pounding! Rated: R

programme.title: Quarantine 2: Terminal, (2011, Adventure)
programme.desc: Earlier tonight, a bizarre disease was unleashed in a run-down Los Angeles tenement... and no one got out alive. Yet something escaped. Now, aboard Flight 318, the first symptoms begin to show. Rating: R

programme.title: Paranormal Activity, (2009, Horror)
programme.desc: After a young, middle-class couple moves into what seems like a typical suburban house, they become increasingly disturbed by a presence that may or may not be demonic and active at night.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 2, (2010, Horror)
programme.desc: As a couple welcome a newborn baby into their home, a demonic presence begins terrorizing them, tearing apart their perfect world and turning it into an inescapable nightmare.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 3, (2011, Horror)
programme.desc: Paranormal Activity 3 takes you back to where it all began, and the activity is more intense than ever. The cameras are on and recording the chilling moments when evil begins to terrorize young sisters Katie and Kristi for the first time.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4, (2012, Horror)
programme.desc: Katie disappeared with her nephew Hunter with no survivors. Five years later she's returned with a mysterious boy, ready to target new victims with her demonic rage in a quiet neighborhood.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Marked Ones, (2014, Horror)
programme.desc: The activity is back and has claimed a new victim. Jesse has been hearing horrifying sounds from his neighbor’s apartment, but when he sets out to uncover their source, he encounters an ancient evil that won’t rest until it’s claimed his soul.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension, (2014, Horror)
programme.desc: For the first time you will SEE the activity... When a new family moves into a familiar house, they discover a mysterious video camera that reveals the presence of a demonic threat and soon find themselves terrorized by an ancient evil.

programme.title: A Message from Brianna, (2021, Horror)
programme.desc: A Message from Brianna

programme.title: Red Dawn, (1984, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: The outbreak of World War III has occurred, leaving a group of mid-Westernrn high school students turned refugees to slowly organize themselves into an effective guerilla force.

programme.title: Road House, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze stars with Kelly Lynch, Sam Elliott and Ben Gazzara in this classic, action-filled tale of a cool but tough bouncer -- with a degree in philosophy -- at a Midwestern roadhouse who goes head to head with an insidious mob boss.

programme.title: Steel Dawn, (1987, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A nomad warrior must help save a beautiful woman and her young son from a band of henchmen stalking them through the desert after a nuclear war.

programme.title: The Golden Child, (1985, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: As ‘The Chosen One’, Murphy’s on a madcap mission to save The Golden Child, a youth with mystical powers who’s been abducted by an evil cult.

programme.title: Fright Night, (1985, Horror Classics)
programme.desc: Meet Jerry Dandridge. He's sweet, sexy, and he likes to sleep in late. You might think he's the perfect neighbor. But there's just one thing you should know. Jerry prefers his drinks warm, red and straight from the jugular! Rated: R

programme.title: Deepstar Six, (1989, Horror)
programme.desc: In the semi-distant future, a nuclear research and missile base on the ocean floor is jeopardized by an enormous crustacean. The trapped undersea team of scientists must battle for their lives.

programme.title: The Golden Child, (1985, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: As ‘The Chosen One’, Murphy’s on a madcap mission to save The Golden Child, a youth with mystical powers who’s been abducted by an evil cult.

programme.title: Fright Night, (1985, Horror Classics)
programme.desc: Meet Jerry Dandridge. He's sweet, sexy, and he likes to sleep in late. You might think he's the perfect neighbor. But there's just one thing you should know. Jerry prefers his drinks warm, red and straight from the jugular! Rated: R

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: When his mentor Admiral James Greer becomes ill, Ryan is appointed acting CIA Director of Intelligence.

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Sci-Fi Horror)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Operation Condor, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan ignites the big screen as the world's greatest secret agent, code name Condor. Sent to track down stolen Nazi gold, he is pursued by a ruthless band of treasure-hunting terrorists on a globe-spanning quest to reach the bounty first!

programme.title: Operation Condor II: The Armour Of The Gods, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is a fortune hunter whose ex-girlfriend is kidnapped by an evil cult! Things kick into high gear when her fiancée, an old friend of Jackie’s, asks him for help in securing the kidnappers’ lone demand: the priceless Armor of The Gods!

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off, (1986, Screwball)
programme.desc: High school senior, Ferris Bueller, decides to cut school and is determined to experience a day of pure freedom with his girlfriend and best friend in downtown Chicago before graduating.

programme.title: Dear God, (1996, Screwball)
programme.desc: Special delivery for comedy fans! Greg Kinnear ( Auto Focus) stars in and Garry Marshall ( Pretty Woman) directs this spirit-lifter about a money-scamming con artist who goes from no-good to doing good.

programme.title: Mother, (1996, Screwball)
programme.desc: A neurotic, twice divorced sci-fi writer moves back in with his mom to solve his personal problems.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Mob Town, (2019, Drama)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Hoodlum, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: Shottas, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: Two young men from Jamaica climb to the top of the criminal world in Miami, with a constant presence of drugs, extortion, and deceit.

programme.title: Get Shorty, (1995, Comedy)
programme.desc: Golden Globe® winner John Travolta stars with Gene Hackman, Danny DeVito and Rene Russo in this wildly popular comedy of a gangster who turns into a big-time producer after he travels to Hollywood to collect a debt from a down-and-out filmmaker.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: An adventure of a millionaire playboy who steals a priceless work of art and then strikes up a fiery romance with the brilliant female insurance investigator who is on to his game.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly, (2012, Drama)
programme.desc: During the economic turmoil of 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), an enforcer, is hired to restore order after three idiots rob a mob-protected poker game.

programme.title: King of New York, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dollars, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: The Man With No Name (Clint Eastwood) receives offers from two gangs terrorizing a small town and accepts both, setting in motion a plan to destroy the criminals in a series of brilliantly orchestrated setups, showdowns, and deadly confrontations.

programme.title: For A Few Dollars More, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood returns as the Man With No Name, who teams up with equally lethal Colonel Mortimer (Lee Van Cleef) in pursuit of a sadistic killer and his band of desperadoes in this non-stop action classic from legendary director Sergio Leone.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Ugly, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood portrays the invincible 'Man With No Name' in lethal pursuit of $200,000 in Confederate money alongside Lee Van Cleef and Eli Wallach in this renowned, influential, and classic cinematic western directed by the great Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Ran, (1985, Drama)
programme.desc: Ran, Akira Kurosawa’s visually dazzling samurai epic, is the story of Lord Hidetora and his three warring sons. A cinematic masterpiece, in sumptuous digital 4K (where available).

programme.title: The Hidden Fortress, (1960, Drama)
programme.desc: Lured by gold, two greedy peasants unknowingly escort a princess and her general across enemy lines.

programme.title: Rashomon, (1951, Drama)
programme.desc: The rape of a bride and the murder of her samurai husband are recalled from the perspectives of a bandit, the bride, the samurai's ghost and a woodcutter.

programme.title: Seven Samurai, (1956, Drama)
programme.desc: Farmers from a village exploited by bandits hire a veteran samurai for protection, and he gathers six other samurai to join him.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula, (1992, Thriller)
programme.desc: Gary Oldman, Winona Ryder and Anthony Hopkins star in director Francis Ford Coppola's visually stunning, passionately seductive version of the classic Dracula legend. Rated: R

programme.title: Hudson Hawk, (1991, Heist Films)
programme.desc: Willis is Eddie "The Hawk" Hawkins, the world's most famous cat burglar, who, after 10 years in prison, is ready to go straight. But it's not going to be easy for The Hawk.

programme.title: As Good as It Gets, (1997, Drama)
programme.desc: A heartwarming story of three outcasts coping with the frustrations of life in New York City. Starring Jack Nicholson as a curmudgeon and Greg Kinnear as a gay artist who live in the same building with Helen Hunt, the waitress who changes their lives.

programme.title: Supercop (1996), (1992, Action)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan, Michelle Yeoh, and Maggie Cheung lead an action-packed classic with jaw-dropping stunts, from leaping out a ten-story building onto an airborne helicopter to landing on top of a speeding train.

programme.title: The Big Hit, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: The Big Hit, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: Dillinger, (1973, Drama)

programme.title: Crazy Mama, (1975, Action)

programme.title: The Friends of Eddie Coyle, (1973, Thriller)
programme.desc: As a small time hood Eddie is about to go back to jail. In order to escape this fate he deals information on stolen guns to the feds. Simultaneously he is supplying arms to his bank robbing/kidnapping hoodlum chums.

programme.title: Big Jake, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: The Shootist, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.

programme.title: The Molly Maguires, (1970, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Life is rough in the coal mines of 1876 Pennsylvania. A group of Irish emigrant miners, known as the Molly Maguires, fights against the cruelty of the mining company with sabotage.

programme.title: Big Jake, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze. Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed. Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Tea helps him uncover the mysteries of his past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.
programme.sub-title: Yugi Vs. Rare Hunter Part 1 - Battle City Begins

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.
programme.sub-title: Yugi Vs. Rare Hunter Part 2 - Up Against Exodia

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck. Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up as long as he believes in the heart of the cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To counter Arkana's Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: the Dark Magician Girl!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes. Will Weevil's royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik's nefarious Rare Hunters, the silent but deadly Strings.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters: the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magic card Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts. If Joey wins, he'll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.
programme.sub-title: Double Duel Part 1 - Yugi and Kabia Vs. Lumis and Umbra

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?
programme.sub-title: Double Duel Part 2 - Yugi and Kabia Vs. Lumis and Umbra

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.
programme.sub-title: Double Duel Part 3 - Yugi and Kabia Vs. Lumis and Umbra

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!
programme.sub-title: Double Duel Part 4 - Yugi and Kabia Vs. Lumis and Umbra

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura Part 2

programme.title: Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Protect Kaya! The Usopp Pirates' Great Efforts!

programme.title: Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates’ efforts to save her with a ship to call their own – the Going Merry!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Anger Explosion! Kuro vs. Luffy! How it Ends!

programme.title: On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: You're the Weird Creature! Gaimon and His Strange Friends!

programme.title: In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world’s greatest swordsman – but tragedy intervened.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Three-Sword Style's Past! Zoro and Kuina's Vow!

programme.title: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Famous Cook! Sanji of the Sea Restaurant!

programme.title: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Unwelcome Customer! Sanji's Food and Ghin's Debt!

programme.title: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Strongest Pirate Fleet! Commodore Don Krieg!

programme.title: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Protect Baratie! The Great Pirate, Red Foot Zeff!

programme.title: The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman Zoro Falls At Sea!

programme.title: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Deadly Foot Technique Bursts Forth! Sanji vs. The Invincible Pearl!

programme.title: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zeff and Sanji's Dream! The Illusory All Blue!

programme.title: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Ghin!

programme.title: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I Won't Die! Fierce Battle, Luffy vs. Krieg!

programme.title: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Conclusion of the Deadly Battle! A Spear of Blind Determination!

programme.title: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Explore! A Kingdom of Love and Passion - Dressrosa!

programme.title: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Full of Enthusiasm! The Corrida Colosseum!

programme.title: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Dangerous Love! The Dancer Girl - Violet!

programme.title: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Formidable, Unknown Warrior! Here Comes Lucy!

programme.title: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Fateful Reunion! Bellamy the Hyena!

programme.title: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Super Rookie! Bartolomeo the Cannibal!

programme.title: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big Names Duke It Out! The Heated Block B Battle!

programme.title: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Deadly Blow! The Astonishing King Punch!

programme.title: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Fighting Fish Strike! Across the Deadly Iron Bridge!

programme.title: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Unknown World! The Tontatta Kingdom!

programme.title: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Stratagem of the Century! Doflamingo Makes His Move!

programme.title: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shaking Heaven and Earth! Admiral Fujitora's Power!

programme.title: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Blow of Anger! A Giant vs. Lucy!

programme.title: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Destruction Cannon Blasts! Lucy in Trouble!

programme.title: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Legendary Pirate! Don Chin Jao!

programme.title: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Light and Shadow! Darkness behind Dressrosa!

programme.title: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Making a Sortie! The Legendary Hero Usoland!

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn, (1996, Vampires)
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money, (1999, Vampires)
programme.desc: When a gang of bank robbers makes a run for the border, they wander into the wrong bar and mess with the wrong vampires. It's kill-or-be-killed in the ultimate battle to stop these evil creatures and save their own lives!

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: Hangman's Daughter, (1999, Vampires)
programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this prequel to the From Dusk Till Dawn series finds outlaw Johnny Madrid on the run from the hangman, with the hangman's daughter Esmeralda by his side. Together they are faced with the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Species, (1995, Sci-Fi Horror)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Cyborg, (1989, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: The Covenant, (2006, Thriller)
programme.desc: To the students of the Spenser Academy, the Sons of Ipswich are the baddest boys on campus. But that's not all they share. The four friends also share a 300-year-old secret: they're warlocks, the teenage descendants of a 17th-century coven of witches.

programme.title: Return of Sabata, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: Last Train From Gun Hill, (1959, Western)
programme.desc: Screen giants Kirk Douglas and Anthony Quinn star in this taut Western thriller directed by acclaimed filmmaker John Sturges (Gunfight at the O.K. Corral, The Great Escape).

programme.title: Man From Del Rio, (1956, Western)
programme.desc: When a Mexican gunslinger rids a town of several notorious gunfighters, he is named the sheriff, but must win over the rest of the residents who are yet to warm to his hard-hitting ways.

programme.title: The Ride Back, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: A lawman's grim duty and an outlaw's despair collide as Texas Marshal Hamish (William Conrad) must transport outlaw Kallen (Anthony Quinn) to face justice. But when Hamish is seriously wounded, which will Kallen choose: freedom or redemption?

programme.title: Sam Whiskey, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies, (1937, Western)
programme.desc: When cattle-ranch foreman Gene Autry learns that the new ranch owner, Sandra Knight, plans to raise sheep on a scientific basis, he must convince her to sell them as they will ruin the land.

programme.title: The Old Barn Dance, (1938, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Frog Millhouse are horse traders who run into trouble when an unscrupulous tractor company starts selling the modern machines to farmers.

programme.title: Gold Mine in the Sky, (1938, Western)
programme.desc: When spoiled Eastern gal Cody inherits a ranch, it is up to the ranch foreman, Gene Autry, to keep things in order. Since Cody can't sell the ranch until she weds, she makes plans to marry a Chicago cattle broker and turns the place into a dude ranch.

programme.title: Shotgun, (1955, Western)
programme.desc: The west ablaze with the Technicolor legend of the Shotgun Avenger! There was always open season on women like Abby!

programme.title: Cannon For Cordoba, (1970, Western)
programme.desc: Set against the 1912 Mexican Revolution, Captain Rod Douglas (George Peppard) leads a small band of misfits into Mexican territory to destroy six cannons, stolen by bloodthirsty revolutionaries and their infamous leader Hector Cordoba (Raf Vallone).

programme.title: The Big Country, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby, (2016, Best of British Humor)
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is back, this time unexpectedly expecting a baby while unsure of the identity of the dad. Oscar® winners Renée Zellweger and Colin Firth are joined by Patrick Dempsey in this next chapter of Bridget's hysterically unpredictable life.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out, (2014, Comedy)
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed moms' night out. But to enjoy it, they need their husbands to watch the kids for a few hours-what could go wrong?

programme.title: I Love You, Man, (2009, Comedy)
programme.desc: A friendless groom-to-be meets the ultimate dude and the two begin a "bro-mance" which takes male-bonding to hilarious new heights that will keep you laughing to the end.

programme.title: Freedom Writers, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: Hilary Swank stars in this story about a teacher in a racially divided school who gives her students what they’ve always needed - a voice.

programme.title: Center Stage, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: The American Ballet Company is not for the fainthearted, it's for the most gifted and beautiful ballet dancers alive. But you'll need more than mere physical prowess and determination to succeed. PG-13

programme.title: Moms' Night Out, (2014, Comedy)
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed moms' night out. But to enjoy it, they need their husbands to watch the kids for a few hours-what could go wrong?

programme.title: The Tailor of Panama, (2001, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on the 1996 novel, this is a mixture of thriller and black comedy. Harry Pendel is the tailor to the powerful of Panama. Harry is known for his storytelling and suits, but soon his tales carry lethal repercussions.

programme.title: Center Stage, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: The American Ballet Company is not for the fainthearted, it's for the most gifted and beautiful ballet dancers alive. But you'll need more than mere physical prowess and determination to succeed. PG-13

programme.title: Sailor Moon Super S: The Movie
programme.desc: The evil Queen plots to trap Earth in a energy field, powered by the dreams of children. Sailor Moon and the Sailor Guardians must now save the world!

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi Tsukino is a schoolgirl who meets a talking cat named Luna. Usagi is transformed into Sailor Moon, the guardian who fights for love and justice.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A house of fortune opens up and gains popularity for its predictions. The customers begin to act violent. Usagi and Luna decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: Punishment Awaits: The House Of Fortune Is The Monster Mansion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls in town are tuning in to a radio program that reads out love letters. A sleeping sickness is plaguing the town that puts people to sleep.
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious Sleeping Sickness: Protect the Girls In Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is shocked to find out that she’s gained weight from too much eating. Determined to get back into shape, Usagi and her friends join a gym.
programme.sub-title: Learn How to Be Skinny from Usagi

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo brings home a pet Chanela. Shingo becomes so absorbed in the Chanela that he stops going to school, which worries Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Scent of a Monster: Chanela Will Steal Your Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi bumps into Yusuke Amade, a famous musician who claims he is being chased by a monster. Usagi and Luna decide to keep an eye on Yusuke.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Melody of Love: Usagi Plays Cupid

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Naru dream of becoming famous like Mikan Shiratori. When the girls hear that Mikan is hosting a talent contest, they see their chance.
programme.sub-title: Usagi Learns Her Lesson: Becoming a Star Is Hard Work

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi befriends Ami Mizuno, the school’s smartest girl. But Luna, who senses an unknown energy coming from Ami, suspects her of being a Monster.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Genius Is a Monster: The Brainwashing Cram School of Horror

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Ami find a clock that resembles Luna. That night, the clock emits a strange light that causes Usagi to become very impatient.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Disaster: Beware of the Clock of Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: People who take the bus near the Hikawa Shrine have started to go missing. Usagi and her friends decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Bus: Enter Mars, the Guardian of Fire

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians go to the amusement park where visitors have gone missing. But Usagi is more focused on playing than finding the missing people.
programme.sub-title: Usagi vs. Rei: Nightmare in Dream Land

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei goes off on a luxury cruise with Ami after winning tickets through the local lottery. Feeling left behind, Usagi sneaks aboard the ship.
programme.sub-title: I Want a Boyfriend: The Luxury Cruise Ship is a Trap

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Jadeite is given a warning by Queen Beryl, who can no longer tolerate the general’s failures. Jadeite challenges the Sailor Guardians to a showdown.
programme.sub-title: Girls Unite: The End of Jadeite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rui is a talented tennis player but Naru has noticed a dark change in her. Worried about their classmate, Naru and Usagi go to investigate.
programme.sub-title: A New Enemy Appears: Nephrite's Evil Crest

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami brings Usagi and Rei to her favorite park. Rei decides to have a date with Mamoru at the park before it closes down.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Juban District is having a contest to decide who can design the best wedding dress. Usagi, Rei, and all the girls in town compete.
programme.sub-title: A Girl's Dream: Usagi Becomes a Bride

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A photographer named Kijin Shinokawa holds a modeling contest. All the girls who have entered begin disappearing after Shinokawa photographs them!
programme.sub-title: Usagi's a Model: The Flash of the Monster Camera

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo’s friend Mika gives him a doll but Shingo unintentionally breaks the doll and hurts Mika’s feelings. Shingo decides to apologize.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi receives a love letter from Tuxedo Mask, stating that he’d like to meet her. She finds out that all the girls in town received the same letter.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Joy: A Love Letter from Tuxedo Mask

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls search for a vacation spot so they can focus on training. Instead, they settle on a mansion that has a very eerie service staff.
programme.sub-title: The Summer, the Beach, Youth and Ghosts

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami spots Nephrite and follows him to an animation studio that is making the Sailor V movie. Ami calls Usagi and Rei so they can investigate.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Children's Dreams: Friendship Through Anime

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Kingdom of Diamonds is hosting a party to reveal their treasure to the world. Both the Sailor Guardians and the Dark Kingdom crash the party.
programme.sub-title: Romance Under the Moon: Usagi's First Kiss

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Naru has fallen in love with Masato Sanjoin. Knowing that Sanjoin is really Nephrite, Usagi tries to convince Naru to give up on her feelings.
programme.sub-title: Wish upon a Star: Naru's First Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nephrite uncovers Sailor Moon’s identity as Usagi. His attempt to finish her off is cut short when he learns that Naru has been kidnapped by Zoisite.
programme.sub-title: Naru's Tears: Nephrite Dies for Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A new girl named Makoto Kino transfers to Usagi’s school, but her tough attitude seems to scare everyone away. Usagi quickly becomes friends with her.
programme.sub-title: Jupiter, the Powerful Girl in Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians grow in strength with its newest member Sailor Jupiter joining the team. Sailor Moon is appointed as team leader.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi learns that a transfer student named Ryo Urawa seems to have a crush on Ami, and tries to help him out.
programme.sub-title: Crushing on Ami: The Boy Who Can See the Future

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Naru attend an art exhibit by Yumemi Yumeno. Usagi and Mamoru are both asked by Yumemi to become models for her latest painting.
programme.sub-title: The Painting of Love: Usagi and Mamoru Get Closer

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Makoto discover Motoki has a girlfriend named Reika. His relationship is in jeopardy due to Reika’s chance to study abroad.
programme.sub-title: Total Chaos: The Messy Love Rectangle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Grandpa Hino has become emotionally unstable, causing Rei to worry. The new apprentice Yuichiro tries to cheer her up.
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Loses Control: Rei in Danger

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and friends meet a girl who they believe holds the final Rainbow Crystal. But they realize it’s her pet cat that possesses the Rainbow Crystal!
programme.sub-title: Loved and Chased: Luna's Worst Day Ever

programme.title: Lawless, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A sadistic Chicago lawman comes to 1931 Virginia to shut down the Bondurant brothers' bootlegging business.

programme.title: Desperation Road, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A woman and her young daughter get caught in the crossfire when whiskey, guns and the desire for revenge violently intersect in a rough-and-tumble Mississippi town.

programme.title: Snitch, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: To save his teenage son from an unjust prison sentence, a businessman (Dwayne Johnson) makes a deal with a U.S. attorney (Susan Sarandon) to infiltrate a dangerous drug cartel and become an informant.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: After a rival crook hires a pair of bumbling thieves (Scoot McNairy, Ben Mendelsohn) to rob their card game, mobsters hire a reluctant hit man (Brad Pitt) to settle the score.

programme.title: Mud, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: On a Mississippi River island, two young friends (Tye Sheridan, Jacob Lofland) encounter a fugitive (Matthew McConaughey) whose wild tales about a beautiful woman and a line of bounty hunters come true.

programme.title: Den of Thieves, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: An elite unit of the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department squares off against a crew of ex-military men who hatch an elaborate plan for a seemingly impossible heist -- the city's Federal Reserve Bank.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete, (1970, Entertainment)

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Lerato está grávida; Prospero não gosta da proposta de Abayomi, o que cria rivalidade entre ele e Jacob; Thembi perdoa Jacob pela sua colaboração com Abayomi; Jacob e Lerato se casam. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob enfrenta as queixas de Lerato; Bola procura seu pai para o matar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bola quer unir o Conselho à sua causa e ameaça Jacob se ele ficar em Lagos; os associados de Jacob estão nervosos por Abayomi estar morto; o tribunal aceita o pedido de Bola e cancela o testamento; Folaké descobre a duplicidade de Prospero. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob visita Folaké e descobre a traição de seu amigo; Bola diz a Prospero que pode influenciar o setor energético; Lerato está no hospital e corre o risco de sofrer um aborto espontâneo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Vigilante Mascarado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Lutador profissional abandona a vida de violência e se torna pastor em uma pequena cidade. Entretanto, a criminalidade do local o obriga a retomar os velhos hábitos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Hacker - Todo Crime Tem um Início, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Alex Danyliuk passa a ter problemas financeiros em sua família e busca no crime uma solução para a situação. Com a ajuda de criminoso virtual, ele passa a roubar a identidade das pessoas e a cometer pequenos desvios de dinheiro. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Código de Honra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O coronel Robert Sikes tem uma missão: livrar sua cidade do crime. Ele faz de tudo para conseguir alcançar seus objetivos, mas para isso precisa enfrentar seu antigo aprendiz, que deseja prendê-lo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Lejos de la tierra quemada, (1970)

programme.title: 2001. Cartman recebe como herança de sua avó um milhão de dólares e decide cumprir seu maior sonho: comprar um parque de diversão somente para ele, no qual ele não precisa fazer fila para subir nos brinquedos, já que ninguém mais pode entrar. programme.title: 2004. Cartman se fantasia de um robô chamado "Genial-O 4000" e Butters acredita que ele de fato é um robô. programme.desc: South Park - T08E02

programme.title: 2004. Cartman estava tentando voar, mas o máximo que conseguiu foi um golpe na cabeça e isso fez com que ele ficasse dois dias em coma. programme.desc: South Park - T08E13

programme.title: 2005. Os meninos ficam com raiva de Cartman quando ele come a parte mais gostosa das asas de frango, e decidem ignorá-lo. Todos começam a fazer o mesmo. programme.title: 2005. Cartman promove o ódio na escola contra os meninos com cabelo vermelho, sardas e pele pálida, dizendo que eles não tem alma e não sobrevivem ao sol. programme.title: 2020. Durante a procura pelas plantas espalhadas, Naruto e sua equipe percebem que as ações de Genno é uma distração. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Erro Do Alvo - T01E199

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros ficam chocados pelo número de papéis bombas colocadas pela aldeia. Enquanto removem os selos, Homura e Koharu inesperadamente chegam para ajudar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Poderoso Ajudante - T01E200

programme.title: 2020. Naruto confronta Genno, e Shikamaru percebe que todas as armadilhas são uma distração. A intenção de Genno é enterrar a aldeia num deslizamento de pedras. Será que os 11 ninjas poderão salvar a aldeia da destruição? Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Múltiplas Armadilhas! Contagem Regressiva Para A Destruição
programme.desc: Naruto: Múltiplas Armadilhas! Contagem Regressiva Para A Destruição - T01E201

programme.title: 2020. Naruto Uzumaki e Sakura pegam os microfones como apresentadores, e o programa começa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: As Cinco Super Batalhas Ninja! - T01E202

programme.title: 2020. Naruto encontra uma jovem menina chamada Yakumo desenhando algo estranho. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU e os médicos ninja chegam para levá-la. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada
programme.desc: Naruto: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada - T01E203

programme.title: 2020. Naruto sonha que Yakumo deseja se tornar uma ninja e Kurenai ameaça selar o poder dela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Poder Selado De Yakumo - T01E204

programme.title: 2020. Os atacantes são membros da clã Kurama da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Naruto e os outros vão à vila para proteger Yakumo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage
programme.desc: Naruto: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage - T01E205

programme.title: 2020. Naruto vai para o hospital, quando Unkai, o ninja que os atacou na vila, aparece. Eles procuram pela aldeia e chegam a uma teoria baseada nos movimentos dos insetos parasitas de Shino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Genjutsu Ou Realidade? - T01E206

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Yakumo pôs Kurenai numa situação desesperada, e o terrível segredo da vila Kurama é revelado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Habilidade Supostamente Selada - T01E207

programme.title: 2020. A missão de Naruto e Kiba é proteger a premiada tigela de chá e ir até o cliente Shinemon. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Peso Do Artefato Premiado! - T01E208

programme.title: 2020. Gantetsu, um Ninja Renegado, pede que alguém o acompanhe para sair da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Inimigo: O Ninja Renegado - T01E209

programme.title: 2020. Depois de evadir a emboscada dos Ninjas Renegados, Naruto, Gantetsu e Todoroki acabam num labirinto de floresta que confunde o senso de direção humana. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Desconcertante Floresta - T01E210

programme.title: 2020. O relacionamento entre Gantetsu e Todoroki é revelado, e a tensão entre os dois aumenta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Recordação Das Chamas - T01E211

programme.title: 2020. Depois de uma batalha intensa, Naruto consegue encurralar o inimigo, mas um menino é levado embora. O menino é Akio, o irmão mais novo de Todoroki e presumido morto por Todoroki. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Para Cada Um Seu Próprio Caminho
programme.desc: Naruto: Para Cada Um Seu Próprio Caminho - T01E212

programme.title: 2020. Naruto encontra um jovem que está ferido e que perdeu a memória. Tsunade é cautelosa com a presença do menino, mas Naruto fica impressionado pela bondade do garoto e insiste que ele fique. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Lembranças Desaparecidas - T01E213

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade acredita que há uma conexão entre Menma e a Aldeia Escondida do Som. Naruto e os outros vão para o País dos Arrozais para dar uma olhada nas memórias de Menma. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Voltando À Realidade - T01E214

programme.title: 2020. Durante a batalha, Naruto descobre que Menma é um membro de uma gangue de bandidos que atacou sua aldeia. Chamado de traidor pelo líder da gangue, Menma revela seu maior segredo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Passado A Ser Apagado - T01E215

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade coloca Shikamaru numa missão para resolver o sequestro de Matsuri, uma candidata ninja da Aldeia da Areia, cometido pelos quatro celestiais. Os genins da Folha são chamados outra vez. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Shukaku É O Alvo - T01E216

programme.title: 2020. Shino, Hinata e Neji procuram pelo inimigo enquanto Shikamaru espera pelo momento certo para atacar. A verdadeira intenção dos quatro celestiais é capturar Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Aliança Dos Shinobi Da Areia Com A Folha
programme.desc: Naruto: A Aliança Dos Shinobi Da Areia Com A Folha - T01E217

programme.title: 2020. Os oponentes de Gaara armam uma armadilha. Gaara acaba sendo preso pelo jutsu secreto Formação de Escala Reversa e sua areia é completamente selada. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Areia Selada:O Contra-Ataque! - T01E218

programme.title: 2020. Gaara e Naruto encurralam Hoko, o último dos quatro celestiais, num vale. Eles descobrem que o objetivo deles era roubar o chacra de Shukaku, o Espírito da Areia, e assim ter o poder para desafiar as Cinco Grandes Nações. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Derradeira Arma Renasce - T01E219

programme.title: 2020. Gaara se transforma em Shukaku, o Espírito da Areia, e obtém uma vitória impressionante. Depois da batalha, alguns descobrem novos caminhos para seguir, e Naruto decide ser ainda mais forte ao ir numa jornada de treinamento com Jiraiya. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Partida - T01E220

programme.title: 2020. Bem-vindo à Aldeia Oculta da folha, onde ninjas assassinos percorrem a terra, e o travesso Naruto Uzumaki apronta encrenca aonde for. Ao roubar o antigo pergaminho do selo, ele libera um poder único raramente visto em um garoto de 12 anos! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Naruto Uzumaki Chegando! - T01E01

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente se forma na Academia Ninja e diz que sabe tudo. Bom, pelo menos é isso que ele conta para Konohamaru, o neto tampinha do líder da aldeia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Meu Nome É Konohamaru - T01E02

programme.title: 2020. Para se tornar um ninja, Naruto precisa formar uma equipe com seus colegas, a bela Sakura e o sério Sasuke, que têm uma coisa em comum: o ódio que sentem por Naruto. Então, Naruto tenta conquistar Sakura fingindo ser a paixão da vida dela... Sasuke! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos
programme.desc: Naruto: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos - T01E03

programme.title: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04

programme.title: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe chegam ao País das Ondas, onde o perverso negociante chamado Gato controla a terra. Gato contrata Zabuza Momochi para matar Tazuna. Animado, Naruto não vê a hora de enfrentar esse poderoso ninja assassino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Assassino Da Névoa - T01E07

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi está em vantagem na batalha contra Zabuza, mas a situação se reverte quando Kakashi é preso na Prisão de Água de Zabuza! Kakashi insisite para que a equipe fuja, mas Naruto lembra da promessa que fez de nunca mais fugir e decide ficar!! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Juramento De Dor - T01E08

programme.title: 2020. Graças ao plano de Naruto, Kakashi escapa da Prisão de Água. Zabuza é derrotado e ferido, mas de repente um misterioso ninja rastreador aparece e mata Zabuza. Naruto se espanta ao ver um garoto não muito mais velho que ele derrotar Zabuza tão facilmente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi, O Guerreiro Sharingan - T01E09

programme.title: 2020. Recuperando-se na casa de Tazuna, Kakashi conclui que Zabuza não morreu e que o jovem ninja o ajudou a escapar! Kakashi decide começar um novo treinamento para ajudar Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura a controlarem melhor seus chakras! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta do Chakra - T01E10

programme.title: 2020. Na aldeia com Tazuna, Sakura vê o sofrimento do povo no País das Ondas governado por Gato. Tazuna constrói uma ponte que dará acesso a outras terras para as pessoas não dependerem mais de Gato. Naruto e Sasuke treinam, usando chakra para subir em árvore. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu
programme.desc: Naruto: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu - T01E11

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto treina para controlar seu chacra, alguém misterioso aparece de repente e diz que, para se tornar forte, é preciso ter determinação para proteger o que ama. A figura misteriosa ecoa o sentimento de Naruto, e os dois sentem uma conexão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Na Ponte: Zabuza Retorna - T01E12

programme.title: 2020. É hora de lutar contra Zabuza outra vez, e agora ele está acompanhado do ninja rastreador. Os dois reparam as habilidades de Sasuke, e ele percebe o imenso poder do ninja mascarado. Sasuke e o ninja se preparam para lutar, como se o destino os chamasse. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo
programme.desc: Naruto: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo - T01E13

programme.title: 2020. Sasuke está em apuros dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku, e Naruto chega para salvá-lo. Sasuke tem um plano para combater o jutsu de Haku, mas falha por causa das ações inesperadas de Naruto. Por fim, os dois jovens ninjas são presos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga - T01E14

programme.title: 2020. Vendo que não há tempo a perder, Kakashi decide usar o Sharingan mais uma vez para derrotar Zabuza. Mas Zabuza é um ninja experiente em batalhas mortais e, na primeira vez em que enfrentou o Sharingan, Zabuza conseguiu bolar uma estratégia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Visibilidade Zero: O Sharingan Desvendado - T01E15

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sasuke são atacados dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku. Durante a batalha, Sasuke percebe o poder do seu próprio Sharingan e começa a desviar dos ataques de Haku. Haku decide acabar com ele. Sasuke usa seu corpo para proteger Naruto... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Selo Quebrado - T01E16

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente explode! Sua raiva por Haku libera o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. O chakra de Naruto está tão intenso que até Kakashi e Zabuza, que estão lutando à distância, percebem. Haku é incapaz de fazer algo diante do poder secreto de Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Passado Branco, Ambição Escondida - T01E17

programme.title: 2020. Haku pede a Naruto que acabe com ele. Naruto questiona a filosofia de Haku sobre existir apenas para lutar e ganhar. Enquanto isso, a batalha entre Kakashi e Zabuza chega ao clímax. Com a vitória ao alcance, Kakashi libera sua manobra mais devastadora. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: As Armas Conhecidas Como Shinobi - T01E18

programme.title: 2020. Pensando em Haku, Naruto confronta Zabuza com raiva. Sem demonstrar emoções, Zabuza se sente arrasado pela perda de Haku, a única pessoa em quem confiava no mundo. Naruto aprende que esse tipo de realidade cruel é, de fato, o destino de um ninja. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Demônio Na Neve - T01E19

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe voltam à Aldeia Oculta da Folha depois da batalha do País das Ondas. Mesmo concluindo novas missões, Naruto está insatisfeito com a rotina diária, mas logo ele descobre que estrangeiros estão se juntando na Aldeia da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin - T01E20

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura são escolhidos para fazer a Prova Chunin. Iruka se opõe à participação dos três, pois os considera muito novos e inexperientes para o desafio. Kakashi, porém, acredita que eles cresceram e estão mais prontos do que nunca. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Identifique-Se : Novos E Poderosos Rivais - T01E21

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se preparam para a prova, um ninja chamado Rock Lee aparece. Lee quer lutar contra Sasuke, que possui o poder do clã Uchiha. Sasuke aceita o desafio de Lee, mas fica só na defesa devido aos ataques rápidos desse oponente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke - T01E22

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se inscrevem oficialmente para a Prova Chunin e formam um time. Para passar, nenhum membro pode falhar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam - T01E23

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe iniciam a primeira prova. O examinador é Ibiki Morino, um jonin (ninja de alto nível) notório e perito em interrogração. Sasuke e Sakura estão preocupados, pois se Naruto responder tudo errado, eles também falharão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Liguem Os Motores A Prova Chunin Começa
programme.desc: Naruto: Liguem Os Motores A Prova Chunin Começa - T01E24

programme.title: 2020. A parte mais difícil da prova começa na pergunta 10. Antes dos ninjas escutarem a pergunta, Ibiki coloca uma regra injusta para o problema: quem responder errado será reprovado e não terá o direito de fazer qualquer Prova Chunin no futuro. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Décima Pergunta Ou Tudo Ou Nada
programme.desc: Naruto: A Décima Pergunta Ou Tudo Ou Nada - T01E25

programme.title: 2020. Konohamaru, neto do Terceiro Hokage da Aldeia da Folha, aparece durante a Prova Chunin com Moegi e Udon e cobre eventos para o jornal da Academia Ninja. Ele vê Naruto como um irmão mais velho e, entrevistando os personagens, reconta suas aventuras. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta Da Morte - T01E26

programme.title: 2020. Na floresta da morte começa a segunda parte da Prova Chunin. Cada time recebe um tipo de pergaminho e deve roubar o outro tipo de outro time, chegando ao ponto final na torre com os dois pergaminhos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Prova Chunin Segunda Etapa A Floresta Da Morte
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin Segunda Etapa A Floresta Da Morte - T01E27

programme.title: 2020. A segunda parte da prova começa na floresta da morte. Sasuke nota que um inimigo se disfarçou de Naruto. Sasuke salva e desamarra Naruto, e os três membros criam uma senha para quando ficarem separados outra vez. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Comer Ou Ser Comido - Pânico Na Floresta
programme.desc: Naruto: Comer Ou Ser Comido - Pânico Na Floresta - T01E28

programme.title: 2020. O ataque do ninja da Grama é poderoso demais para Sasuke e Sakura. Sasuke pensa em entregar o pergaminho, mas Naruto o impede. A raiva de Naruto cresce e seus poderes são revelados. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Contra-Ataque De Naruto, Nunca Se Renda!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Contra-Ataque De Naruto, Nunca Se Renda! - T01E29

programme.title: 2020. Ao ver Naruto lutar contra o ninja da Grama, Sasuke percebe que estava errado em fugir. Sasuke usa todo o potencial do seu Sharingan para afastar o ninja. Ele se apresenta como Orochimaru, some e deixa uma Marca da Maldição em Sasuke, que cai em dor. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Sharingan Revivido: Jutsu Chama Do Dragão
programme.desc: Naruto: O Sharingan Revivido: Jutsu Chama Do Dragão - T01E30

programme.title: Naruto: Interrupção ... O Acordo Acabou ! - T01E93
programme.desc: 2020. Com o desejo de ver Nawaki e Dan, Tsunade quase aceita o acordo tentador de Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Atacar! A Fúria Do Rasengan! - T01E94
programme.desc: 2020. Orochimaru e Kabuto usam um jutsu de invocação para chamar uma cobra gigante. Ainda drogado e incapaz de usar seu chacra, Jiraiya invoca o pequeno Gamakichi. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Poder De Uchiha - T01E52
programme.desc: 2008. Os bonecos criados de humanos podem comandar o jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo. Assim, o boneco do terceiro kazekage converte chakras em poderes magnéticos. Chiyo e Sakura se protegem, Sasori faz um ataque implacável. Sakura toma uma decisão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Título - T01E53
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura revida o ataque da areia de ferro. Ela rapidamente começa a ler os padrões de ataque do Sasori, que se prepara para usar seu chakra. O ataque da areia de ferro penetra o espaço, Sakura é atingida na mão e é infectada pelo veneno! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Pesadelo - T02E54
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura destrói o boneco do terceiro kazekage graças a um antídoto que ela tomou e que funciona durante cerca de três minutos. Chiyo e Sakura decidem derrotar Sasori nesse prazo. Sasori usa seu último trunfo. Naruto e Kakashi planejam capturar Deidara. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T01E24
programme.desc: 2012. Graças à ajuda de Canary, Gon e os outros se aproximam da mansão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Pedro Volpato, Gabriel Martins, Wallace Raj, Vitor Mello, Dlaigelles Silva Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T01E25
programme.sub-title: Não se Enxerga x Quando x se Está Cego
programme.desc: 2012. Gon e seus amigos encontram o açougueiro Gotoh que propõe um jogo para decidir se eles são dígnos ou não de serem amigos de Killua. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Pedro Volpato, Gabriel Martins, Wallace Raj, Vitor Mello, Dlaigelles Silva Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E08
programme.desc: 2012. JoJo resgata a irmã de Poco. Dire, um amigo de Zeppeli, bate de frente com Dio. Com a espada de Blueford nas mãos, JoJo volta a enfrentar Dio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T01E09
programme.desc: 2012. JoJo e Erina embarcam em um cruzeiro para a lua de mel. Mas, para o espanto de JoJo, uma pessoa ligada a Dio aparece a bordo do navio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: One Piece - T01E03
programme.sub-title: Morgan vs. Luffy! Quem é a Linda Jovem?
programme.desc: 1999. Luffy quer que Zoro seja seu companheiro a todo custo, e propõe libertá-lo para juntos enfrentarem o Capitão Morgan. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu

programme.title: One Piece - T01E04
programme.sub-title: O Passado de Luffy! Shanks, o Ruivo!
programme.desc: 1999. Navegando ao lado de Zoro, Luffy relembra seu passado e conhece Nami e o bando do pirata Buggy, o Palhaço. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E14
programme.desc: 1995. Em viagem a Barcelona para receber um prêmio especial, Ryu, Ken e Chun-Li encontram Vega, um dos melhores toureiros da Espanha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kōji Tsujitani, Kenji Haga, Chisa Yokoyama, Tesshō Genda, Kenji Utsumi, Ryōichi Tanaka Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E15
programme.desc: 1995. Ao participar de um baile em Barcelona, Ken percebe que a aparição de Vega parece ter um efeito inusitado em Chun-Li. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E157
